channel.title: brb-traveling
channel.description: A personal travel journal and photo diary — field notes, tips, and photos from Iceland, Finland, Norway, Taiwan, China, and Korea.

item.title: Iceland's south coast: a 3-day road trip guide
item.description: A practical 3-day route from Reykjavík to the glacier lagoon — the waterfalls and black sand beaches worth stopping for, what driving in Iceland is actually like, and what to pack.

item.title: 22 hours in Seoul: a layover itinerary
item.description: How to turn a long Incheon layover into a real night in Seoul — KBBQ, a jjimjilbang instead of a hotel, the Han River at night, and breakfast at Gwangjang Market.

item.title: China travel notes
item.description: Beijing duck, Chengdu hotpot, the Great Wall, and a country that runs on one app — the biggest culture shift in the shortest amount of time.

item.title: Taiwan travel notes
item.description: A last-minute week in Taipei that turned into the warmest stop of the year — midnight beef noodle soup, Elephant Mountain, a monsoon, and the kindest strangers anywhere.

item.title: Korea travel notes
item.description: Twenty-two hours in Seoul, treated like a sprint — KBBQ, a jjimjilbang, the Han River at night, and showing two friends the city my family is from.

item.title: Finland travel notes
item.description: I went to Finland for the SkySauna and Santa Claus Village, and stayed for the quiet — Helsinki saunas, Arctic Circle stamps, and a husky sled through complete silence.

item.title: Norway travel notes
item.description: Oslo, Bergen, and a fjord cruise that looks fake in person — plus a wordless gym session that proved the deadlift is a universal language.

item.title: Iceland travel notes
item.description: Driving Iceland's south coast, where the scenery resets every twenty minutes — black sand beaches, glaciers, hot springs, and the best gas station food on the planet.
